arts.ttl: Dean Huijsen transfer latest as Liverpool and Chelsea learn Bournemouth star's release clause
arts.sum: Dean Huijsen is set to be one of the most sought after players of the summer transfer window and Chelsea and Liverpool are understood to be plotting a move for the Spain international, who has a £50m release clause in his contract with Bournemouth

arts.ttl: Liverpool favourite got away with 'crazy' Everton moment - 'Thank God there was no VAR!'

arts.ttl: 'We have to accept': Manager now admits his £70m captain could leave this summer after Liverpool make move
“He is not interested” – Agent insists player is ignoring Liverpool and Manchester City transfer rumours
arts.sum: Juventus full-back Andrea Cambiaso is not interested in the rumours linking him to Liverpool and Manchester City this summer. That’s according to his agent Giovanni Bia, who has been speaking to Tuttomercatoweb about the 25-year-old and his future plans. arts.ttl: Everton and Brighton could be priced out of move for 23-year-old – Price tag just keeps rising
arts.sum: Everton and Brighton and Hove Albion may find themselves priced out of a move for VfB Stuttgart striker Nick Woltemade, as they now value him at €40-50m.
